results.title: Why cool roofs remain a missed opportunity in India
results.description: India’s concrete rooftops trap dangerous heat, yet cool roofs remain underused. Explore how reflective coatings can cut indoor temperatures, lower electricity bills, protect low-income families from heat stress, and why behavioural barriers, not just awareness, are holding back wider adoption across Indian cities.
